author: dashboard-bootstrap
content: Hardening commit added: commit_object_exists probe (git cat-file -e sha^{commit}) disambiguates git's 'Not a valid object name' between path-absent-from-valid-commit and vanished-commit-object. agent_ids and git_cat_file_blob now hard-error on a pruned/corrupt object store instead of reading as empty hub/default state. New regression test destroys .git/objects post-construction. Gates: clippy clean, 1915 lib tests passing. Awaiting push.
